Home.hero_desc: Share, discover, and sell projects built 100% by AI. Every line of code generated from a prompt. No manual coding. Pure vibe.

Guide.title: Welcome to VibeHub
Guide.subtitle: Your complete manual for the AI-generated project community.
Guide.section1_desc: Discover thousands of apps built with zero manual coding. Filter by the AI tools used (like Cursor or v0.dev), categories, and check the 'AI Score' assigned by our automated curator.
Guide.section2_desc: Got a killer project made with AI? Head to 'Submit', link your repository or demo, describe your prompt chain, and let our AI Curator analyze your code instantly to rank it.
Guide.section3_desc: Have a prompt sequence that generates perfect landing pages? Sell your templates, prompt chains, or AI-agents directly to other creators.
Guide.section4_desc: Connect your GitHub or Hugging Face accounts to build your creator profile. Rank up on the weekly leaderboard by gaining stars and AI score boosts.
